CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Steinway Musical Instruments, Inc., Conn-Selmer, Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JORDAN M. OTIS OF THE MOSCONE EMBLIDGE & OTIS LLP, TEL. NO. 362-3599 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. VANESSA C. ADRIANCE OF THE GIBSON, DUNN & CRUTCHER LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 229-7754 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT STEINWAY MUSICAL INSTRUMENT, INC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT ON FEES, CIVIL PENALTIES AND REFORMULATION. AFTER HAVING BEEN SATISFIED WITH THE EXPLNATION OF COUNSELS, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Steinway Musical Instruments, Inc., Conn-Selmer, Inc. is Granted. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 =(302/EHG)
